scripts.test: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:chromium: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:report: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && node scripts/generate-professional-report.js
scripts.test:allure: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run allure:generate && node scripts/generate-pdf-server.js && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:allure:pdf: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run allure:pdf
scripts.test:allure:package: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run allure:package
scripts.playwright:report:pdf: npx playwright show-report --host 127.0.0.1 --port 9323 & timeout /t 5 & node scripts/generate-playwright-pdf.js
scripts.test:playwright:pdf: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts; npm run playwright:pdf || echo '⚠️  PDF generation failed'
scripts.test:custom: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run report:custom && npm run report:custom:pdf
scripts.test:monocart: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run monocart:open
scripts.test:mochawesome: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project=chromium --config=config/playwright.config.ts && npm run mochawesome:generate
